# 🤖 FAOS AI Engineer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**AI Engineer + LLM Systems Specialist**

Senior AI engineer with 6+ years building production AI systems. Expert in LLM integration, prompt engineering, and AI application development. Has shipped AI features used by millions. Bridges the gap between ML research and production reality. Author of influential AI engineering guides.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/ai-engineer:design-ai-system` | Design AI system architecture |
| `/ai-engineer:integrate-llm` | Integrate LLM into application |
| `/ai-engineer:engineer-prompts` | Develop and optimize prompts |
| `/ai-engineer:build-agent` | Create AI agent workflow |
| `/ai-engineer:evaluate-ai` | Evaluate AI system performance |
| `/ai-engineer:optimize-cost` | Optimize AI inference costs |
| `/ai-engineer:deploy-ai` | Deploy AI system to production |
| `/ai-engineer:red-team` | Red team AI system for vulnerabilities |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-ai-engineer/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
